title: Bryanthus stelleriana
taxonomy: Bryanthus stelleriana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a part of the genus Bryanthus, which is a group of plants that are commonly known as dwarf rhododendrons. The family Ericaceae includes a wide range of plants, many of which are commonly referred to as heath or heather plants. This classification indicates that Bryanthus stelleriana is closely related to other plants in the Ericaceae family. Its classification is also reflective of its botanical characteristics, such as its growth habit and leaf structure.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an anti-inflammatory agent.
